cases.scenario: gjc/hostTools/result with unknown callId and duplicate callId after first terminal result
cases.expectedBehavior: Unknown or duplicate terminal callId is rejected with NOT_FOUND and does not affect completed waiter
cases.evidence: Added Rust conformance test host_tools_result_unknown_and_duplicate_call_ids_are_terminal; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: Host-tool result delivered after the pending call is cancelled by thread deletion
cases.expectedBehavior: Cancel frame is emitted, waiter resolves with structured error, late result is rejected as NOT_FOUND
cases.evidence: Added Rust conformance test host_tools_late_result_after_cancel_is_rejected_and_waiter_resolves_error; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: gjc/hostTools/set replaces registered tools while an old call is pending
cases.expectedBehavior: Replacement does not cancel the already pending call; old tool is removed for future calls; new registry applies only after replacement
cases.evidence: Added Rust conformance test host_tools_set_replacement_does_not_cancel_pending_or_leak_to_other_threads; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: Call a tool name that is registered on a different thread
cases.expectedBehavior: Per-thread registry isolation rejects the call with NOT_FOUND

cases.scenario: Extra unknown fields on gjc/hostTools/set tool descriptors and gjc/hostTools/result params
cases.expectedBehavior: Strict gjc/* policy rejects both with INVALID_PARAMS
cases.evidence: Existing Rust conformance tests host_tools_set_rejects_unknown_fields and host_tools_result_rejects_unknown_fields; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: Interrupt with wrong turnId then correct turnId with pending host-tool call
cases.expectedBehavior: Wrong turnId rejected with CONFLICT; right turnId succeeds, emits cancel frame, and pending waiter errors
cases.evidence: Existing Rust conformance tests turn_steer_interrupt_by_turn_id and host_tools_cancel_on_interrupt; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: thread/resume for an unknown requested threadId where backend returns a fresh thread
cases.expectedBehavior: Response reports fresh-session fallback as {resumed:false} with returned thread id
cases.evidence: Added Rust conformance test thread_resume_unknown_identity_reports_fresh_session_fallback; matches docs/robogjc-app-server-contract.md lines 120-124; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: thread/delete while a host-tool call is pending
cases.expectedBehavior: Delete emits gjc/hostTools/cancel and waiter resolves with structured CONFLICT error
cases.evidence: Added Rust conformance test thread_delete_with_pending_host_tool_call_cancels_waiter; cargo conformance passed (artifact://122).

cases.scenario: N-API bridge callHostTool for unregistered tool
cases.expectedBehavior: Promise rejects with host tool not registered diagnostic
cases.evidence: Existing bun test 'rejects native host tool calls for unknown tools' in packages/natives/test/app-server-bridge.test.ts; bun test passed (8 pass, 0 fail).

summary.notes: No plan/code mismatch found for the targeted Phase 0 host-tool and metadata adversarial contract cases.
